arts.ttl: £70m man, England international - Five Premier League strikers Leeds United could sign in summer - Leeds Live
arts.sum: Leeds United will have not signed a striker in approaching two years when the summer transfer window opens at the end of this season. LeedsLive understands Southampton turned down an approach from the Whites to sign Cameron Archer on loan last month .

arts.ttl: Leeds v Sunderland preview: Farke’s psychological test
arts.sum: Leeds United have a major test tonight to see off a promotion rival and significantly consolidate their place at the top of the table in the process. Daniel Farke’s Leeds side have been well clear of their rivals in virtually every underlying metric, but they take on Sunderland tonight second in the division.

arts.ttl: Adam Pope confirms late Leeds United v Sunderland late refereeing change
arts.sum: Leeds United v Sunderland was due to be officiated by Craig Pawson tonight, but the Sheffield United fan is now being replaced by Stuart Attwell in the middle. However, the Sheffield United fan has been moved off of duty, with Adam Pope confirming that he is replaced by Stuart Attwell tonight instead:

arts.ttl: Leeds United star will cement himself as best in division if he passes £19m test tonight
arts.sum: Jayden Bogle has finally won over the Leeds United fanbase after his start at the club, and he’s been one of the best players in the side this season, facing a big test this evening though against Sunderland . Jayden Bogle up against one of league’s best in Enzo Le Fee tonight

arts.ttl: Sheffield United show their nerve and title credentials as Leeds United 'pressure' comment made
arts.sum: Sheffield United held their nerve and found a way to win by giving the type of performance that just may be the difference in the race for the Championship title and promotion, according to boss Chris Wilder. I'd have loved to have played like we did on Wednesday night (against Middlesbrough), which was really controlled against a different type of team.

arts.ttl: When Leeds United could seal promotion to the Premier League
arts.sum: It’s not quite at that stage of the season just yet, but should Leeds United see off Sunderland and Sheffield United in their next two games, some supporters may be looking at when they can get the promotion bunting out. If Leeds win every game then, looking at the fixture list, United could reach 91 points away at Luton Town in early April.

arts.ttl: Club want to ‘close the deal immediately’ for Sunderland star – Black Cats could be tempted by offer
arts.sum: Chris Rigg has impressed for Sunderland this season. The teenager has played 28 times in the Championship, scoring four times and assisting once and becoming a key part of the side under Regis le Bris. InterLive have reported today Inter Milan are a potential suitor for the youngster and the feeling is that the Nerazzurri The post Club want to ‘close the deal immediately’ for Sunderland star – Black Cats could be tempted by offer appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Leeds vs Sunderland Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Leeds will look to return to the top of the Championship when they welcome promotion-chasing Sunderland to Elland Road tonight. Ahead of the game, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided...

arts.ttl: Report: PL scouts to watch Leeds United v Sunderland
arts.sum: Tottenham and Crystal Palace scouts are claimed to be attending Leeds United v Sunderland tonight, but luckily for the Whites, they have a Black Cats star in their sights. Leeds and Sunderland boast arguably the most talented sides in the division this season, and it’s no surprise that reports from the Express relay claims that Tottenham and Crystal Palace scouts will be keeping track of events at Elland Road tonight.

arts.ttl: How did Roma midfielder Le Fee end up joining promotion-chasing Sunderland?
arts.sum: After Trai Hume found him with a pass that made its way through the legs of Luton's Lamine Fanne with concerning ease, he rolled his right foot over the ball, took a touch to steady himself, a touch to set himself and then hit a shot that curled and dipped before landing in the bottom right corner of the net.
